description: Три домени (code, legal, general) з семантично еквівалентними парами. Якщо embedder добре розуміє семантику — пари сидять поруч. Якщо ні — кластеризується за поверхневою лексикою домену.

chunks.text: Section 3.1: All items in the inventory register shall be arranged in ascending order by numeric value prior to audit submission.
Arrange the numbers from smallest to largest. That way you can find things easily later.
Clause 7.2(b): Access to the System shall be denied to any party who fails to present valid credentials in accordance with the authentication protocol specified herein.
You need to log in first. If you don't have an account, the system will just turn you away.
Article 17 (GDPR): The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller the erasure of personal data concerning him or her without undue delay.
When someone asks to remove their info, you just take it out of the records and move on.
Clause 9.4: In the event of a transmission failure, the transmitting party shall undertake no fewer than three (3) additional attempts, with exponentially increasing intervals between each.
If the first try fails, just keep trying a few more times — but wait a bit longer each time so you don't spam the server.
Section 11.1: The Merchant hereby agrees to refund the Customer the full purchase price within fourteen (14) business days of a valid cancellation request.
Give the customer their money back if they don't like the product. Usually takes a couple weeks.
Section 4.3: The Service Provider reserves the right to throttle or restrict the frequency of requests submitted by any individual user at its sole discretion.
Don't let anyone hammer the server too fast. Cap them to a few requests per minute.

presets.text: how to put numbers in order from small to big
block people who didn't log in
remove user information from the system
obligation to reimburse customer upon cancellation
stop users from sending too many requests
